nodes.label: T0 results (locality-bound ceiling)
nodes.rationale: The two pre-decision controls: decay is NOT lr/passes under-training but temperature is a free lever; the ~5 ceiling is LOCALITY-bound (w12 full-e2e composes all 12 layers) -> native depth curable via cheap global credit.

nodes.label: The ~5-layer ceiling is locality-bound
nodes.rationale: Widening the credit window marches the composing peak monotonically deeper (w1->L3 ... w12->L12, no decay); full-e2e backprop composes all 12 layers on the SAME InfoNCE. So the ~5 ceiling is the forward-only LOCALITY cap, not an objective/task limit -> native depth is curable via cheap global credit (w12 = forbidden diagnostic upper bound).
